title: Ballot Box Bunnies
short_description: It's election day in Carrot Town — count the votes fairly, find the winner, and learn how voting and majorities work.
description: It's election day in Carrot Town and the bunnies are voting for their next mayor! Count the votes fairly and decide who wins — because in a real vote everyone gets a say and the most votes wins. It teaches the non-partisan basics of civics: tallying votes, what a majority means, why ballots are secret, and how ties are settled. Grade bands ramp from 'who got the most', to majorities and ties, to plain-language questions about how fair voting actually works. A free online civics and voting game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the winning candidate or the correct answer about voting.
